text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Revisiting Deep Learning Models for Tabular Data" is real, published at NeurIPS 2021 (arXiv:2106.11959). The cited authors (Gorishniy, Rubachev, Khrulkov, Babenko) exactly match the real authors; the automated checker's "mismatch" on "Vadim" vs. "Yu. V." is a minor first-name formatting/transliteration difference — "Yury Gorishniy" is the full form of the same person.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2106.11959
